quality.rationale: 基于微分几何背景的张量恒等式证明，依赖全反对称符号缩并与反对称性，推导步骤完整且可推广至任意维数与秩

origin.question: Problem 3.28. Show that $\delta_{\\lambda \\kappa}^{\\mu \\nu} = -\\frac{1}{2}\\varepsilon^{\\mu \\nu \\rho \\sigma}\\varepsilon_{\\lambda \\kappa \\rho \\sigma},$ and generalize to $\delta_{\\lambda \\dot s \\kappa}^{\\mu \\dot s \\nu}$ of other ranks.
origin.solution:
Solution 3.28. The indices $\mu, 
u, \lambda, \kappa$ must take on different values from $ho, \sigma$ . For given $ho, \sigma$ , we can have $\mu$ equal to $\kappa$ (with $
u$ then equal to $\lambda$ ) or $\mu$ equal to $\lambda$ (with $
u$ then equal to $\kappa$ ). All other possibilities vanish because of the antisymmetry of $\varepsilon^{\mu 
u ho \sigma}$ . Furthermore, because of that antisymmetry, the $\mu = \kappa$ , $
u = \lambda$ case has a minus sign. Thus
$$
\varepsilon^{\mu \nu \rho \sigma}_{\varepsilon_{\lambda \kappa \rho \sigma}} = \mathsf {C} (\delta_{\lambda}^{\mu} \delta_{\kappa}^{\nu} - \delta_{\kappa}^{\mu} \delta_{\lambda}^{\nu}) \equiv \mathsf {C} \delta_{\lambda \kappa}^{\mu \nu}
$$
for some C. Summing on $\mu, \lambda$ and $
u$ , k and using the results of Problem 3.22 gives $C = -2$ . Thus
$$
\delta_{\lambda \kappa}^{\mu \nu} = - \frac {1}{2} \varepsilon^{\mu \nu \rho \sigma} \varepsilon_{\lambda \kappa \rho \sigma}.
$$
In general
$$
\begin{array}{l} \varepsilon^{\mu \nu \lambda \tau}_{\iota \kappa \rho \sigma} = - \delta_{\iota \kappa \rho \sigma}^{\mu \nu \lambda \tau} \\
\varepsilon^{\mu \nu \lambda \tau} \varepsilon_{\iota \kappa \rho \tau} = - \delta_{\iota \kappa \rho}^{\mu \nu \lambda}. \\
\end{array}
$$
